title: Resources for Small Businesses
text:
Resource Links
DoW Subcontracting Basics(external link opens in new window)
Basic information relevant to the Department of Defense subcontracting program
Guide to Marketing to DoW(external link opens in new window)
Relevant information for Small Businesses interested in working for the DoW
U.S. Small Business Administration Subcontracting Opportunities Directory(external link opens in new window)
Developed from subcontracting plans that are submitted to the Government
Other Links
The North American Industry Classification System(external link opens in new window) (NAICS)
Basic information relevant to the standard used by Federal statistical agencies in classifying business establishments
Table of Small Business Size Standards(external link opens in new window)
Basic information relevant to the Small Business Size Standards matched to North American Industry Classification System Codes
Small Business Administration(external link opens in new window)
Basic information relevant to the U.S. Small Business Administration
APEX Accelerators(external link opens in new window)
Basic information relevant to the Association of Procurement Technical Assistance Centers
Small Business Development Center (SBDC)(external link opens in new window)
Basic information relevant to the Small Business Development Centers located in your area.
DoW Office of Small Business Programs(external link opens in new window)
Basic information relevant to the Department of Defense Office of Small Business Programs
